title: Warlery's Dark Blood | Survival Horror
description: all nights turns in to a nightmare, its kill and survive!, this mod adds monsters, weapons and more!
body:
Thanks for 17k Downloads!

 

Enjoy the discord group!

https://discord.gg/f4E46AV4kJ

 

My Patreon!

https://patreon.com/WarlerysDev    

NEEDS GECKO LIB MOD

My YOUTUBE Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@Warlerys-du5ds/featured

\*\*WARLERY'S DARK BLOOD\*\* IS A SURVIVAL HORROR, WHEN THE PLAYER NEEDS WEAPONS AND MORE TO SURVIVE HORRORIFIC NIGHTS WHO THE WALKERS TRY TO DEVOUR THE PLAYER!.

LORE

Decades before the events in Warlery's HQ, the protagonist (you) was sent on a rescue mission to a mysterious world, formerly a world where resources were exploited to the maximum power, in that world, strange and grotesque events have occurred, once the protagonist enters there, he will lose all communication, as time goes by, the protagonist will encounter creatures that have no explanation of how they exist, creatures that will haunt and torment the protagonist to his maximum madness.

 

**THE NIGHTS TURNS IN TO A NIGHTMARE**

Survive is your only solution, the world is getting haunted by misterious and gross nightmare creatures.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1165178/description_a586d92e-2f5c-42d8-90f2-e276eacbf803.png)

  

**SOMETHING IS WRONG, GET SOME WEAPONS.**

This mod Adds more than 30 New Weapons for destroy that monsters!

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1165178/description_ef050b96-d9b7-4a32-8e21-3800570d78dc.png)

 

**WE NEED HELP!, WHAT WILL WE DO?**

The only way to obtain the good items, is killing Walkers, Walkers drop Souls which can be tradeable to obtain crates, Crates after destroy it drops weapons or some good stuff!

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1165178/description_be198e91-139b-4cca-93d4-c8193a892f15.png)

    

**WHO ARE THE WALKERS?**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1165178/description_ef1547a2-474a-4a52-80c2-160e7d68c0f1.png)

_Walkers are Demoniac grossy entities, most of the walkers are humanoids with putrid flesh and blood in their bodys, walkers are failed attemps of replicate the previous visitors, they come to the world for meat, depressed people or punish the people who commit crimes and traumas, walkers are physical incarnations of the traumas, faults or illnesses of previous visitors to the world._

  

**__GOOD LUCK SURVIVOR…__**

 

**CHECK THIS SIMPLE TUTORIAL**

****

                            Technically this mod doesn't have an ending but a alternative ending is completing the advancements of the mod, monster advancements can be obtained by melee kill without MOD crits!.   Warning: each weapons advancement which you collect can Increases the difficult spawn rate, To change the difficult just change in the world the vanilla difficult. Warning 2: This mod in the other side is a Difficulty mod, don't ask to make the mod easier because it won't happen! . you can play this mod with your friends too!
   Common Questions: How i can unlock all the monsters?, i just only play casual
if you want to play a casual world killing monsters skipping all the history you must write of find this command /dbunlockmonsters or /dbunlockboss dbunlockmonsters: unlocks all the monsters including the nightmares. dbunlockboss: unlocks all the monsters and final boss including the nightmares, its like a end game instantly   For what audience was the mod made? Experienced players with survival horror, combat, players who enjoy reading, and players who love this type of horror (body horror). Mod not recommended for children. Is this mod really difficult? Not really. At first, it's highly recommended to come up with a plan so that the walkers don't catch you on the first night. The combat implemented in the mod makes it more dynamic and tactical. Where can I find the recipes for the boxes? In this latest version, the recipes in the boxes were implemented when you kill the first walker. This was done because my previous method didn't work, and people who made videos of the mod didn't know how to do it. This mod doesn't have jumpscares or other common elements of Minecraft horror mods. Why? Because it's Psychological Horror, this mod isn't about scaring the viewer, but rather making them feel uncomfortable, watched, nervous, and even anxious during their first fight, making them feel vulnerable to whatever might happen. When I am killed, the walkers do not disappear. Why? Walkers only disappear when you don't have cheats enabled in the world.    **DEMO 1.1.16**: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D50moO6pc6c&t=18s\*\*\_](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D50moO6pc6c&t=18s**_)   _**Music and some assets Credits:**_ **Silent Hill Games**
